top_visible_issues: Mobile performance score of 52 suggests room for optimisation and may impact user retention on smaller devices.
Navigation and layout issues noted publicly, including a cluttered structure and a contact form that is difficult to locate, which may reduce enquiry and booking conversions.
No blog or content updates are present, which limits organic search visibility for a well-reviewed local salon competing in a tourist-heavy town.
outreach_hook: Petals Hair & Beauty has built a strong local reputation with 312 reviews at 4.8 stars, but the current website may not be converting that trust into new bookings as effectively as it could. Navigation difficulties and a hard-to-find contact form can quietly cost enquiries, and there is a clear opportunity to improve content visibility through a simple blog or news section. A focused optimisation would help the site better reflect the quality of the business and capture more organic traffic from visitors to Westport.
